data.body:
[‘Secret Midnight Party’ Update Celebration – Special Coupon Revealed!]

You’re invited to the Secret Midnight Party, Sensei! 🌙

To celebrate the occasion, Koyuki, Yuuka, and Noa have prepared plenty of gifts just for you.

Make sure to check the coupon codes released over the next three days and claim your rewards!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2944107

#BlueArchive
